bird.name: Croaking cisticola
bird.summary: The croaking cisticola (Cisticola natalensis) is an Old World warbler in the family Cisticolidae. It is a resident breeder in Africa south…

relations.subject: Croaking cisticola
relations.evidence: The croaking cisticola is an insectivorous passerine that is found in rank grassland habitats, often near swamps or water
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
